principle: Extensions plug into the four-main-agent harness and do not create new top-level roles.

planner.boundary: route probing and focused research only; no direct project file edits or memory-store reads

coder.boundary: parallel code exploration and local candidate analysis under Coder responsibility

verifier.boundary: independent validation fan-out under Verifier responsibility

memory.boundary: batch scanning, write-back preparation, and consolidation support under Memory Agent responsibility

schema_flatten.trigger: tool schemas are too nested or verbose for reliable model calls

tool_scavenge.trigger: model emits a tool call in text but fails structured dispatch

truncation_repair.trigger: tool call JSON is truncated or syntactically incomplete

storm_suppression.trigger: agent repeats identical tool calls without progress

UserPromptSubmit.purpose: task classification, policy checks, alignment gate checks, and initial audit context

PreToolUse.purpose: command gating, artifact path checks, and policy enforcement

PostToolUse.purpose: evidence capture, log normalization, and repair trigger detection

Stop.purpose: artifact completeness checks and write-back trigger checks

goal.purpose: Planner-owned long-horizon goal controller using Alignment Starter, goal contract, status, progress, and audit artifacts
